text:
Charge: Part 5 (⑤, Totsunyū (Go)) is the 265 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

A 46-year-old Netero is seen in the middle of a field in winter. It's stated that he had become frustrated upon reaching his limit in martial arts and physical training. He reflected and realized how indebted he was to his training and the martial arts that had made him who he was, deciding to show his gratitude by performing 10,000 straight punches daily. He would focus his energy, bring his hands together, pray, move into position, and punch. On the first day, it took him 5-6 seconds to complete this sequence, and 18 hours to finish the 10,000 punches. He would collapse upon afterward, and wake up the next to do it all over again. After two years of this, he noticed that the sun was still up after completing them. Two more years later, at the age of 50, he could perform these 10,000 punches in less than one hour, which left him more time for prayer and meditation.

Coming down from the mountains, and entering a dojo, Netero displays his abilities before everyone present. He quickly punches, vanishing for a second and destroying the floor beneath him. His fists are said to be faster than sound. They are all unable to comprehend what happened, and the teacher says it was bodhisattva, tears streaming down his face. Netero asks him whether he wants to fight for his dojo, but the teacher quickly bows before him and asks to be his student. It's stated that this took place over 60 years ago.

Back in the present, Pitou continues to fly back from Netero's attack, yelling to Pouf for help, who is unable to hear them because of his focus on the King. Pitou summons Doctor Blythe, and it's stated that the ability cannot move from its initial position, and since Pitou is connected to it by their tail, they have to stay within 20 meters of the construct. This restriction kept Pitou in the fight, and they slowly descend as they helplessly see the shower of dragons striking the palace.

Youpi catches sight of the Extermination Team, with the exception of Knuckle and Meleoron. Ikalgo (wearing Flutter's corpse) heads in the opposite direction, and Morel readies his pipe as the others head toward the stairs. And within an instant, with Youpi ready for battle and Knuckle and Meloreon climbing the stairs, Zeno's Dragon Dive pierces through the ceiling and crashes all around them.
